description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-top picnic basket with a deep, round body and a single, sturdy arched handle. The basket is constructed from interwoven strips that create a visually striking, zigzag pattern, giving it a robust and textured appearance. The material appears to be a reddish-brown, polished wood or synthetic wicker, with a glossy finish that highlights the basket's intricate weave. The handle is attached at two opposite points on the rim and arches gracefully above the opening, providing a comfortable grip for carrying. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding food, drinks, or personal items during outings. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a simple yet functional design.
description: A round, reddish-brown woven picnic basket with a glossy finish and a single arched handle. The open-top design and intricate zigzag weave make it both functional and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The basket is seen from above, highlighting the circular opening and the central placement of the handle.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full arch of the handle and the layered, zigzag weave pattern around the body.
description_view_2: Another top-down angle, emphasizing the depth of the basket and the handle's attachment points.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, with the handle arching over the open basket and the weave pattern clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed arched handle, made of the same woven material as the basket, attached at two opposite rim points.
attribute_weave_pattern: Zigzag, open weave with medium tightness, creating a textured, layered appearance.
